.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a glob pattern for frontend and config files instead of a specific JSON file pattern.
Reorder .editorconfig sections to group preference settings together.
.editorconfig.before:
# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
.editorconfig.after:
# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
...
# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11+ build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.10.x) are incompatible with modern npm packages and may fail to run scripts required for the build process on current systems.

package.json.general_idea: Replace legacy Grunt-based build tooling with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is deprecated and incompatible with the new Angular-based frontend structure; the build will fail without the new tooling.

package.json.general_idea: Migrate frontend framework from AngularJS (1.x) to Angular (11.x).
package.json.why_exists: AngularJS is obsolete and incompatible with the new application structure; the app will not run without the new Angular dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator version to support the new project structure and JDK 11 compatibility.
package.json.why_exists: Old JHipster versions generate code incompatible with JDK 11 and modern frontend standards.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Karma/Jasmine test runner with Jest for frontend testing.
package.json.why_exists: Karma configuration is removed; tests will fail to execute without the new Jest setup.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator version to support the new project structure and JDK 11 compatibility.
package.json.why_exists: Old JHipster versions generate code incompatible with JDK 11 and modern frontend standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit Tomcat starter with the standard Web starter to align with Spring Boot 2.x dependency management.
Add Spring Boot test starter with JUnit Vintage exclusion to support JUnit 5 migration.
Add Spring Boot test dependency for testing utilities.
Add Spring Security test dependency for security testing support.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API for architectural testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 Engine for architectural testing execution.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for RFC 7807 compliant error responses.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization of JWTs.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies in favor of Spring Cloud Binders or native support.
Add Spring Security Data dependency for user details manager support.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics export.
Add Dropwizard Metrics core dependency.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin with Java 11 source/target and annotation processors.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails without explicit source/target levels matching the JDK version in newer Maven/Spring Boot setups.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Add MapStruct Processor for code generation.
Add Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator for type-safe criteria queries.
Add JAXB Runtime as an annotation processor path to resolve missing javax.xml.bind classes in JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime/Compile error: package javax.xml.bind does not exist in JDK 11+ as JAXB was removed from the JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Jib Maven Plugin to use AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image for containerization.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure: Application requires JDK 11 features; running on JDK 8 base image would cause NoSuchMethodError or similar.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 8-15 range, explicitly supporting JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build failure: Old enforcer rules might reject JDK 11 if not updated to allow it.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Yeoman/Grunt frontend plugin with Frontend Maven Plugin for Node/NPM management.
Add Liquibase Maven Plugin for database migration management.
Add Jacoco Maven Plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add SonarQube Scanner Maven Plugin for static analysis.
Add Git Commit ID Plugin to generate git properties.
Add Properties Maven Plugin to read sonar-project.properties.
Add Checkstyle Maven Plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Javadoc Maven Plugin configuration.
Add Failsafe Maven Plugin for integration tests.
Add IDEA Maven Plugin configuration.
Add Resources Maven Plugin configuration for filtering YAML files.
Add Surefire Maven Plugin configuration for unit tests.
Add Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration for repackaging.
Add WAR Plugin configuration for web application packaging.
Add Clean Plugin configuration.
Add Eclipse Plugin configuration.
Add Enforcer Plugin configuration for dependency convergence.
Add H2 database dependency for development/testing profiles.
Add No-Liquibase profile to skip database migrations.
Add API Docs profile for Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.
Add TLS profile for HTTPS configuration.
Add Webpack profile for frontend build management.
Update maven-clean-plugin version to remove explicit version declaration, relying on parent BOM management.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to clean the new static resource directory structure used in JHipster 6.
Refactor spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration to use build-info goal execution instead of manual argument passing.
Add frontend-maven-plugin configuration to manage Node.js and npm installation and Webpack builds.
pom.xml.after:
<plugin>
                        <groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
                        <artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>install node and npm</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <nodeVersion>${node.version}</nodeVersion>
                                    <npmVersion>${npm.version}</npmVersion>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                            <execution>
                                <id>npm install</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>npm</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <arguments>install</arguments>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                            <execution>
                                <id>webpack build test</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>npm</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <phase>test</phase>
                                <configuration>
                                    <arguments>run webpack:test</arguments>
                                    <npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>false</npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                            <execution>
                                <id>webpack build prod</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>npm</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <phase>generate-resources</phase>
                                <configuration>
                                    <arguments>run webpack:prod</arguments>
                                    <environmentVariables>
                                        <APP_VERSION>${project.version}</APP_VERSION>
                                    </environmentVariables>
                                    <npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>false</npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate build information properties.
Update prod profile spring.profiles.active property to include additional profile variables.
Add new Maven profiles (dev, prod, war, IDE, eclipse, e2e) to support JHipster 6 build and runtime configurations.
pom.xml.after:
<profile>
            <id>dev</id>
            <activation>
                <activeByDefault>true</activeByDefault>
            </activation>
            <dependencies>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-undertow</artifactId>
                </dependency>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                    <artifactId>spring-boot-devtools</artifactId>
                    <optional>true</optional>
                </dependency>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
                    <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
                </dependency>
            </dependencies>
            <properties>
                <!-- default Spring profiles -->
                <spring.profiles.active>dev${profile.tls}${profile.no-liquibase}</spring.profiles.active>
            </properties>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>prod</id>
            <dependencies>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-undertow</artifactId>
                </dependency>
            </dependencies>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                     <plugin>
                         <artifactId>maven-clean-plugin</artifactId>
                         <configuration>
                             <filesets>
                                 <fileset>
                                    <directory>target/classes/static/</directory>
                                 </fileset>
                             </filesets>
                         </configuration>
                     </plugin>
                     <plugin>
                         <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                         <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                         <executions>
                             <execution>
                                 <goals>
                                     <goal>build-info</goal>
                                 </goals>
                             </execution>
                         </executions>
                     </plugin>
                     <plugin>
                         <groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
                         <artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                         <executions>
                             <execution>
                                 <id>install node and npm</id>
                                 <goals>
                                     <goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
                                 </goals>
                                 <configuration>
                                     <nodeVersion>${node.version}</nodeVersion>
                                     <npmVersion>${npm.version}</npmVersion>
                                 </configuration>
                             </execution>
                             <execution>
                                 <id>npm install</id>
                                 <goals>
                                     <goal>npm</goal>
                                 </goals>
                                 <configuration>
                                     <arguments>install</arguments>
                                 </configuration>
                             </execution>
                             <execution>
                                 <id>webpack build test</id>
                                 <goals>
                                     <goal>npm</goal>
                                 </goals>
                                 <phase>test</phase>
                                 <configuration>
                                     <arguments>run webpack:test</arguments>
                                     <npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>false</npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>
                                 </configuration>
                             </execution>
                             <execution>
                                 <id>webpack build prod</id>
                                 <goals>
                                     <goal>npm</goal>
                                 </goals>
                                 <phase>generate-resources</phase>
                                 <configuration>
                                     <arguments>run webpack:prod</arguments>
                                     <environmentVariables>
                                         <APP_VERSION>${project.version}</APP_VERSION>
                                     </environmentVariables>
                                     <npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>false</npmInheritsProxyConfigFromMaven>
                                 </configuration>
                             </execution>
                         </executions>
                     </plugin>
                     <plugin>
                         <groupId>pl.project13.maven</groupId>
                         <artifactId>git-commit-id-plugin</artifactId>
                     </plugin>
                 </plugins>
             </build>
             <properties>
                 <!-- default Spring profiles -->
                 <spring.profiles.active>prod${profile.api-docs}${profile.tls}${profile.no-liquibase}</spring.profiles.active>
             </properties>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>war</id>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-war-plugin</artifactId>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <!--
                Profile for applying IDE-specific configuration.
                At the moment it configures MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator, which you need when working
                with DTOs and entity filtering.
            -->
            <id>IDE</id>
            <dependencies>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
                    <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>
                    <version>${mapstruct.version}</version>
                </dependency>
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.hibernate</groupId>
                    <artifactId>hibernate-jpamodelgen</artifactId>
                </dependency>
            </dependencies>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <!-- This is automatically activated when working in Eclipse -->
            <id>eclipse</id>
            <activation>
                <property>
                    <name>m2e.version</name>
                </property>
            </activation>
            <dependencies>
                <!-- The following dependency is added due to issue #9175-->
                <dependency>
                    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-undertow</artifactId>
                </dependency>
            </dependencies>
            <build>
                <pluginManagement>
                    <plugins>
                        <!--
                            This plugin's configuration is used to store Eclipse m2e settings only.
                            It has no influence on the Maven build itself.
                            Remove when the m2e plugin can correctly bind to Maven lifecycle
                        -->
                        <plugin>
                            <groupId>org.eclipse.m2e</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lifecycle-mapping</artifactId>
                            <version>${lifecycle-mapping.version}</version>
                            <configuration>
                                <lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                                    <pluginExecutions>
                                        <pluginExecution>
                                            <pluginExecutionFilter>
                                                <groupId>org.jacoco</groupId>
                                                <artifactId>
                                                    jacoco-maven-plugin
                                                </artifactId>
                                                <versionRange>
                                                    ${jacoco-maven-plugin.version}
                                                </versionRange>
                                                <goals>
                                                    <goal>prepare-agent</goal>
                                                </goals>
                                            </pluginExecutionFilter>
                                            <action>
                                                <ignore/>
                                            </action>
                                        </pluginExecution>
                                        <pluginExecution>
                                            <pluginExecutionFilter>
                                                <groupId>com.github.eirslett</groupId>
                                                <artifactId>frontend-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                                                <versionRange>${frontend-maven-plugin.version}</versionRange>
                                                <goals>
                                                    <goal>install-node-and-npm</goal>
                                                    <goal>npm</goal>
                                                </goals>
                                            </pluginExecutionFilter>
                                            <action>
                                                <ignore/>
                                            </action>
                                        </pluginExecution>
                                    </pluginExecutions>
                                </lifecycleMappingMetadata>
                            </configuration>
                        </plugin>
                    </plugins>
                </pluginManagement>
            </build>
        </profile>
        <profile>
            <id>e2e</id>
            <build>
                <finalName>e2e</finalName>
                <pluginManagement>
                    <plugins>
                        <plugin>
                            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                            <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                            <executions>
                                <execution>
                                    <id>repackage</id>
                                    <goals>
                                        <goal>repackage</goal>
                                    </goals>
                                </execution>
                            </executions>
                        </plugin>
                    </plugins>
                </pluginManagement>
            </build>
        </profile>

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and modern H2 connection string format.
Update JPA Hibernate dialect to use JHipster's custom FixedH2Dialect.
Remove legacy Hibernate naming strategy configuration which is deprecated in newer Hibernate versions.
Update cache configuration to use JHipster-specific properties structure.
Add JHipster specific security JWT configuration properties.
Add Spring Boot DevTools configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
devtools:
    restart:
      enabled: true
      additional-exclude: static/**,.h2.server.properties

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Liquibase context configuration for development profile.
Update logging configuration to use standard Spring Boot format with JHipster specific levels.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add CORS configuration for development profile to allow BrowserSync access.
Update mail configuration to use standard Spring Boot properties structure.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Thymeleaf cache configuration for development profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
thymeleaf:
        mode: XHTML
        cache: false
        viewNames: error

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Jackson serialization configuration for pretty printing in development.
Add H2 console configuration to disable it in development profile.
Add message cache duration configuration using ISO 8601 format.
Add JHipster specific mail base-url configuration.
Add JHipster specific logging configuration for JSON format and Logstash.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
logging:
    use-json-format: false
    logstash:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions and incompatible with modern Spring Boot auto-configuration which expects HikariCP.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to support MySQL 5.5+ and remove deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect and org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy are removed in Hibernate 5.2+ (used by Spring Boot 2.x/JDK 11 era), causing startup failure.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
jpa:
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect
    hibernate:
        naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
jpa:
  # Dialect and naming strategy removed (defaults used)

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace legacy Ehcache region factory with standard Spring Boot cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory is removed in Hibernate 5.2+, causing startup failure if explicitly configured.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Spring Boot 1.x Micrometer-less format to Spring Boot 2.x management.metrics format.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The 'metrics' root property and 'graphite' export configuration are removed in Spring Boot 2.x, causing configuration binding errors or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    graphite:
        enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration to remove deprecated XHTML mode setting.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Thymeleaf 3.x (used in Spring Boot 2.x) defaults to HTML5 mode; explicit XHTML mode may cause parsing issues or is ignored, but the structure change reflects the new property hierarchy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
thymeleaf:
    mode: XHTML
    cache: true
    viewNames: error

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add JHipster specific security and application properties required by the new generator version.
Add server compression and graceful shutdown configuration for production hardening.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
server:
  port: 8080
  shutdown: graceful
  compression:
    enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Add logging level configuration for production environment.
Add Liquibase context configuration for production profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate management endpoint configuration from Spring Boot 1.x legacy properties to Spring Boot 2.x structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding errors or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Data JPA repository bootstrap mode configuration to Spring Boot 2.x property path.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed the property path for repository bootstrap mode from `spring.data.jpa.repositories.bootstrap-mode` (or similar legacy) to `spring.data.jpa.repositories.bootstrap-mode` under the new hierarchy, often requiring explicit `deferred` setting for compatibility with newer Hibernate versions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Hibernate properties to Spring Boot 2.x nested structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires Hibernate properties to be nested under `spring.jpa.properties` rather than flat keys or older prefixes, and specific properties like `hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings` are required for proper ID generation in newer Hibernate versions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true
      hibernate.connection.provider_disables_autocommit: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration to Spring Boot 2.x property path.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moved async task configuration from custom or flat properties to `spring.task.execution`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration to Spring Boot 2.x property path.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes mail configuration under `spring.mail`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
spring:
    mail:
        host: localhost
        port: 25
        user:
        password:
        protocol: smtp
        tls: false
        auth: false
        from: jhipster@localhost
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  mail:
    from: jhipsterSampleApplication@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate message source configuration to Spring Boot 2.x property path.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses `spring.messages.basename` instead of `spring.messageSource.cacheSeconds` and other legacy properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  messages:
    basename: i18n/messages

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration to Spring Boot 2.x compatible structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes context path handling and property binding, requiring updates to Swagger UI and API doc configurations to work with the new servlet path structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JPA and Hibernate naming strategy configurations.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with Hibernate 5.2+ requires explicit naming strategies to maintain compatibility with existing database schemas generated by older versions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: none
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringPhysicalNamingStrategy
        implicit-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringImplicitNamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific server session cookie configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x introduces stricter security defaults for session cookies, requiring explicit configuration for http-only flags.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management metrics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses Micrometer for metrics, requiring new configuration properties for Prometheus and other exporters.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 60
    enable:
      http: true
      jvm: true
      logback: true
      process: true
      system: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific health probe configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3+ introduces liveness and readiness probes, requiring configuration for Kubernetes compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState,datasource
    probes:
      enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific application name configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses `spring.application.name` for various internal purposes, including metrics and actuator endpoints.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  application:
    name: jhipsterSampleApplication

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JMX configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes JMX configuration properties, requiring explicit disabling if not needed.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jmx:
    enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific Thymeleaf configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x may require explicit Thymeleaf mode configuration for HTML templates.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  thymeleaf:
    mode: HTML

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific output ANSI configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x allows explicit control over ANSI console output.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  output:
    ansi:
      console-available: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific info endpoint configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes how info endpoint properties are exposed, requiring explicit configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
info:
  display-ribbon-on-profiles: 'dev'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JHipster client app configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x requires specific client app configuration properties for frontend integration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  clientApp:
    name: 'jhipsterSampleApplicationApp'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific CORS configuration placeholder.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes CORS configuration, requiring explicit setup if needed.

jhipster:
  # cors:

  #     allowed-headers: "*"

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific scheduling task configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moves scheduling configuration to `spring.task.scheduling`.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific bean definition overriding configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1+ disables bean definition overriding by default, requiring explicit enablement for compatibility.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific JPA open-in-view configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x disables open-in-view by default, requiring explicit configuration if needed.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific Hibernate batch size configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with newer Hibernate versions benefits from explicit batch size configuration for performance.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.batch_size: 25
      hibernate.order_inserts: true
      hibernate.order_updates: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific Hibernate query configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with newer Hibernate versions requires explicit query configuration for pagination and parameter padding.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.query.fail_on_pagination_over_collection_fetch: true
      hibernate.query.in_clause_parameter_padding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific Hibernate cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with newer Hibernate versions requires explicit cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jpa:
    properties:
      hibernate.cache.use_second_level_cache: true
      hibernate.cache.use_query_cache: false
      hibernate.generate_statistics: false

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management endpoint exposure configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x requires explicit exposure of management endpoints.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management endpoint health configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes health endpoint configuration, requiring explicit show-details and roles settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management endpoint jhimetrics configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster specific metrics endpoint requires explicit enabling in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoint:
    jhimetrics:
      enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management info git configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes git info configuration, requiring explicit mode setting.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  info:
    git:
      mode: full

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management health mail configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x allows explicit disabling of mail health indicator.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  health:
    mail:
      enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management metrics distribution configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with Micrometer requires explicit distribution configuration for percentiles.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        all: true
      percentiles:
        all: 0, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management metrics tags configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with Micrometer allows explicit tagging of metrics.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    tags:
      application: ${spring.application.name}

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x specific management metrics web request autotime configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x with Micrometer allows explicit enabling of web request autotime.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  metrics:
    web:
      server:
        request:
          autotime:
            enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/liquibase/chan.general_idea: Update Liquibase schema location and namespace to version 4.2 to support newer features and syntax.
Rename core JHipster tables from T_ prefix to jhi_ prefix for better naming conventions.
Add explicit auto-increment ID column to user table, replacing login as primary key.
Rename password column to password_hash and increase length to 60 for BCrypt compatibility.
Increase email column length to 191 to support longer email addresses and index constraints.
Add image_url column to user table for profile pictures.
Increase lang_key column length from 5 to 10 to support more language codes.
Add reset_key and reset_date columns for password reset functionality.
Remove defaultValue for created_by and created_date columns, relying on application logic or DB defaults.
Rename authority tables from T_AUTHORITY to jhi_authority.
Rename user authority table from T_USER_AUTHORITY to jhi_user_authority and update column names.
Remove persistent token table as it is no longer used in newer JHipster versions.
Remove hibernate_sequences table as it is no longer needed with new ID generation strategies.
Update foreign key constraints to reference new table and column names.
Update loadData file paths to new directory structure and table names.
Remove persistent audit event tables as they are no longer part of the core schema.
Add new test table for date/time wrapper testing in newer JHipster versions.
